notes: Entity type is assigned from source table, not localized label text.
BuffTable rows are reported as buffs.
SkillTable-backed skillnames rows with IsBaseSkill=true are reported as base skills.
CTB:3345237628 rows are reported as talent/passive/spec rows.
Weapon-style group class labels are unresolved unless another direct game row supplies the class name; group keys are shared BuffTable icon paths.
CTB field +36 is decoded as a top-level list of effect records. Payload values inside those records are not recursively treated as pointers.
Opcode 6 records are reported as ordered SkillTable id pairs, not ownership.
candidateTalentPassiveSpecs are localized-name candidates only, not proven style relationships.
